name: FMco
description: Compact 2-operator FM voice with direct and CV control over index, ratio, and waveform selection, triggerable decay envelope, chord mode with inversion, encoder tuning, and stereo-widened outputs.

controls.name: Tune
controls.description: Encoder-based tuning control for accurate pitch setting.

controls.name: FM Index
controls.description: Sets FM depth. Responds to direct and CV control.

controls.name: Ratio
controls.description: Sets operator ratio, with a lock switch for free or precise ratios.

controls.name: Wave
controls.description: Selects from the available operator waveforms.

controls.name: Chord
controls.description: Enables four-voice chord mode with inversion control.

inputs.name: Trig
inputs.description: Triggers the built-in decay envelope, which drives both FM depth and output level.

inputs.name: Wave CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over the operator waveform selection.

inputs.name: Chord CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over chord mode and inversion.

behaviors.name: Triggerable voice
behaviors.description: The built-in decay envelope is internally tied to FM depth and output level, so one gate makes the module act like a complete voice.

behaviors.name: 2-operator FM
behaviors.description: Manual and CV control over the FM pair gives a broad range from smooth harmonic tones to metallic inharmonic sidebands.

behaviors.name: Chord mode
behaviors.description: Chord mode provides CV-controlled four-voice harmony with inversion, turning the module into a compact chord voice rather than a single-note oscillator.

behaviors.name: Stereo widening
behaviors.trigger: use OUT L and OUT R together
behaviors.description: The final output widens the image, so the module reads as a finished voice instead of a hard-center mono source.

behaviors.name: Waveform selection
behaviors.description: Eight operator wave shapes are available, letting the same FM structure shift between soft, bright, and more angular spectral content.

patchIdeas.name: FM bell
patchIdeas.patch: Tune to the song root · Ratio locked to a clean harmonic interval · short trigger into Trig · low Index for the attack and a little more depth on sustain · glassy bell strikes without extra envelopes.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FMco:
* Tune: root note
* Ratio: locked
* FM Index: low

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> FMco (Trig)
- Sequencer (CV) p> FMco (Chord CV)
- FMco (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- FMco (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Chord stab
patchIdeas.patch: Chord mode on · inversion stepped from a sequencer CV lane · each trigger opens the decay envelope and lets the voice hit like a one-module chord machine.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FMco:
* Chord: on
* Tune: root note

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> FMco (Trig)
- Sequencer (CV) p> FMco (Chord CV)
- FMco (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Index sweep lead
patchIdeas.patch: A slow LFO into Index CV · Ratio stays locked · Wave set bright · the same note blooms from clean to clangorous as the envelope decays, which makes one voice cover both lead and percussion duties.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FMco:
* Wave: bright
* Ratio: locked

LFO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> FMco (Index CV)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> FMco (Trig)
- FMco (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- FMco (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Wave-morph drone
patchIdeas.patch: Hold a chord with long gates · LFO into Wave CV and Ratio CV · the voice morphs through operator shapes while keeping pitch anchored by Tune · a compact evolving drone that does not need extra oscillators.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FMco:
* Chord: on
* Tune: stable root

LFO:
Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> FMco (Trig)
- LFO (Out) >> FMco (Wave CV)
- LFO (Out) >> FMco (Ratio CV)
- FMco (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- FMco (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Percussive FM split
patchIdeas.patch: Short gates to Trig · Chord CV sequenced over a small range · Index stays modest while Ratio moves aggressively · the left and right outputs widen the transient enough to sit in a mix without an external stereo processor.
patchIdeas.diagram:
FMco:
* Ratio: free
* FM Index: modest

Sequencer:
Mixer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> FMco (Trig)
- Sequencer (CV) p> FMco (Chord CV)
- FMco (OUT L) -> Mixer (L)
- FMco (OUT R) -> Mixer (R)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)
